# TracePact

> Behavioral testing framework for AI agents that use tool calling. Test that your agent calls the right tools, in the right order, with the right arguments.

TracePact is a TypeScript library that provides 30+ custom Vitest matchers for asserting on AI agent tool-call traces. It works with any LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Mistral, etc.) and runs offline with mocks, live against real APIs, or from recorded cassettes.

## When to use TracePact

Use TracePact when you are building or testing an AI agent that uses tool calling (function calling) and you need to verify:
- Which tools the agent called and in what order
- What arguments the agent passed to each tool
- What files the agent wrote
- Whether the agent's text output has the right structure, content, or semantic meaning
- That the agent does NOT call dangerous tools (like bash or delete)

## Docs

- [Quick start and installation](https://tracepact.ai/guide/quick-start): Install, scaffold, and run your first test
- [Full matcher reference](https://tracepact.ai/reference/assertions): All 30+ matchers with signatures and examples
- [CLI reference](https://tracepact.ai/reference/cli): All CLI commands and flags (init, models, run, audit, capture)
- [Configuration reference](https://tracepact.ai/reference/configuration): Config file options, model shorthand, model roles, env vars
- [Mock vs Live testing](https://tracepact.ai/guide/mock-vs-live): When to use mocks vs real API calls
- [CI integration](https://tracepact.ai/guide/ci-integration): GitHub Actions, token budgets, JSON output
- [Cassettes (record and replay)](https://tracepact.ai/advanced/cassettes): Record live runs, replay in CI
- [Semantic assertions](https://tracepact.ai/advanced/semantic-assertions): Embedding-based similarity
- [LLM-as-Judge](https://tracepact.ai/advanced/judge-assertions): Judge assertions with calibration
- [Promptfoo integration](https://tracepact.ai/promptfoo-integration): Use TracePact matchers in Promptfoo evals

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://tracepact.ai/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference for AI assistants
